name: Infinite Seek and Find
short_description: Customize your own hidden object experience - as easy or hard as you want it! Every game is different - combine over 30 different rules or use one of the 3 preset difficulty levels.
detailed_description:
Welcome to your ultimate hidden object challenge. Infinite Seek and Find offers a wide selection of image sets and customizable difficulty level - from basic level where only the size matters to the most hardcore challenge, where the colors can trick you.

  • over 10 image sets with different themes
  • 3 preset difficulty modes and a possibility to set your own custom difficulty
  • images differing by size, rotation, reflection, and colors

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
